title: Yui is awesome
wikitext:
[]: Yui is awesome!             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Feb 17, 2011 9:55 pm I mean, she's the cutest thing in the series (aside from maybe Maya Ibuki), and she's a giant weapon to boot. What's not to like? Silly Song Parody  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:00 pm I wish my mom was a giant cyborg. And yes, Maya is the most adorable character.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:02 pm Are you referring to Yui the woman or Yui the Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:03 pm Seen wrote: I wish my mom was a giant cyborg.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:07 pm child of Lilith wrote: Are you refereeing to Yui the woman or Yui the Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:11 pm Your parody, sir, is quite epic. I would like to congratulate you for writing a silly song about a giant cyborg and still make her sound so smexy.

[]:             Quote Post by Janrok24 » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:12 pm I lol'd over the last picture xD

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:13 pm So I'm not the only one who thinks that Yui is the hottest person in the series? Cool.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:17 pm Your parody, sir, is quite epic. I would like to congratulate you for writing a silly song about a giant cyborg and still make her sound so smexy.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:25 pm I think everyone wants Yui deep down.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:26 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: No reason to discriminate, is there? Honesty, Yui as a woman.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:30 pm DevRei17 wrote: I think everyone wants Yui deep down.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:34 pm Reichu wrote: BAWWWWWWWWWWW WWWWWWWW WWWWWWWWWWWW.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:44 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: But technically, she's always Yui as a woman, even in Eva form, isn't she.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Feb 17, 2011 10:53 pm Reichu wrote: You'd better be implying that Eva-01 is a woman.

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Thu Feb 17, 2011 11:09 pm Reichu wrote: You'd better be implying that Eva-01 is a woman.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 17, 2011 11:31 pm Freaky wrote: I never saw where her woman-hood would have left her... so, yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Feb 17, 2011 11:43 pm Reichu wrote: It also doesn't take much imagination to figure out what's between Lilith's legs. :3

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:07 am Reichu wrote: It also doesn't take much imagination to figure out what's between Lilith's legs. :3

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:28 am Sachi wrote: More legs?
